lines.speaker: Breive
lines.text: Smoke dungeon. *wheeze* Got smoke devils in it. For killing. *splutter*

lines.speaker: Breive
lines.text: My niece Nieve *hack hack* is one of those Slayer Masters. You know, they tell people what to go kill. *cough* I look after this cave for people on assignments like that.

lines.speaker: Breive
lines.text: My nephew Steve *hack hack* is one of those Slayer Masters. You know, they tell people what to go kill. *cough* I look after this cave for people on assignments like that.

lines.speaker: Breive
lines.text: Of course I'm *wheeze* alright. I'm fed up with you young folk asking *cough cough* if I'm alright just because I like a bit of smoke *splutter* in my tubes.

lines.speaker: Breive
lines.text: Don't you come lecturing me on *cough* air quality, young man - I've breathed smoke all my life, man and boy and *euuurgh* and there's no *ghhuk* scientific evidence that it's harmful.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I think I'll leave you alone.

sections.title: When attempting to enter the smoky cave without protection

lines.speaker: Breive
lines.text: Hey, you don't *cough* wanna go in there without *cough* some kind of protection from the smoke. Your lungs aren't as tough as *wheeze* mine.

sections.title: When attempting to kill monsters that aren't part of a player's slayer task
